Hi <@U0173MQEXDG>
I hope you are doing well.
I wanted to reach out and ask if you know anyone in your network who might be looking for a software development partner. If so, we would greatly appreciate it if you could refer them to us. Please feel free to share our contact or make a quick introduction.

Thank you, and hope to hear from you soon.
No problem, Carrick!
No worries ~ thank you for letting us know

The change team ownership feature has been tested and is working as expected. If you want to watch the walk-through to verify it for release, I've done one ◡̈
<https://www.loom.com/share/a4655196fc9d45d5a00cbbe9240137d4>

Hi <@U069WJ0HPQ8|Carrick>

The Change Team Owner feature is working correctly. I completed multiple tests but will mention these two.

Test 1 – Team 44
Transferred from user 416 → user 485
Test 2 – Team 47
Transferred from user 419 → user 497

Both tests confirmed:
Team name stays the same
Stripe customer ID stays the same
Stripe email updates to the new owner's email

This feature appears to be working as expected.

Hi <@U069WJ0HPQ8|Carrick>

I found some bugs with the error messages. Please make these changes:

1. Show separate error messages for username and email
If only the username is not allowed, show: "This username is not allowed. Please choose a different one."
If only the email is not allowed, show: "This email address is not allowed. Please choose a different one."
If both are not allowed, show: "This username and email address are not allowed. Please choose different ones."

2. The error message
Ok <@U02T67RLQUV>
You don't need to start working on it right now
<https://github.com/baamboozle/baamboozle-web-app/issues/640>

<@U069WJ0HPQ8|Carrick>
Regarding the new issue let me just get the approval from Aysar that I explained the issue properly
<https://github.com/baamboozle/baamboozle-web-app/issues/640> [Cannot Delete Disabled Teams After Stripe Subscriptions Have Expired Issue#640]

Summary of test:

• Uploaded new images for Baamboozle and Summer Bowling - confirmed updating immediately for plus, free, and guest users
• Timestamps change each time a new image is uploaded, confirming users always see the latest version
• Changed image and caption for Summer Bowling at the

Monday’s update:
• Fix: choose game modal responsive grid -> Dev done + Deployed on Nusdev
• Fix Aysar reviews code on <https://github.com/baamboozle/baamboozle-web-app/pull/638>
We've been keeping the store for internal use only. Couple of things to confirm before we share the link, if at all :ok_hand:
<@U02T67RLQUV> I just checked our website on production, and it’s still working fine. I’m currently using an internet connection in Vietnam.

We could either
• send them some
• let her buy through Redbubble
Even though I like the first option the most right now

Sending this here before I respond.

Should I just provide a link to the store, or something more?

We can add an internal deep link parser/router. When a user taps a deeplink URL within the app, intercept the URL and route to the corresponding screen directly instead of opening it in the browser. This requires a bit more mobile work.
<@U076RUV983T|Violet> are you saying that there is no way to just link straight to the form from within the app?
We'll conduct the live app final check once the source is frozen.

Is this okay <@U05LZ3VPFUY>?
The mobile side is good to release for now. Do you need to review the mobile code changes <@U09DPBQV5SA|Rudi>?

To improve the experience, we have added an "Open in App" button on the landing page for both iOS and Android, allowing users to manually continue into the app with one additional tap. We have also configured the page with Apple's Smart App Banner (apple-itunes-app meta tag), so when users open the link in Safari, iOS displays a banner with an Open button at the top of the page, providing another convenient way to return to the app.

Hi <@U05LZ3VPFUY>, <@U09DPBQV5SA|Rudi>
Universal Links (iOS) and App Links (Android) are working as designed. They open the app directly when a link is triggered from external apps (e.g., Messages, Mail, Gmail).

However, when the user is already in a browser context (Safari/Chrome) or when a link is rendered as a regular web link inside an app/WebView, the OS may intentionally keep the user in the browser to preserve the browsing experience. In these cases, opening the website first and then ta
Hey <@U09DPBQV5SA|Rudi> it was the deeplink issue (which is related to the improved form builder updates) so you're both correct :smiley:
Violet I think it was form builder related. <@U05LZ3VPFUY> can you please provide more details around the issue?
Do you mean the deeplink issue I discussed with Elliott previously <@U09DPBQV5SA|Rudi>? We have fixed that and in testing it.

Yes, that’s the right screen (Launch Templates → Actions → Set default version) — that’s what I used.
And correct - since CodeDeploy recreates the ASG on every deploy, you can’t pin it on the ASG. Setting the template’s default version is the durable spot: each new ASG resolves $Default →
the right version automatically.
